text:
Created attachment 183196
barman.shar

Please note,this port depend another NEW PORT:https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=219767

Barman (Backup and Recovery Manager) is an open-source administration tool for
disaster recovery of PostgreSQL servers written in Python. It allows your
organisation to perform remote backups of multiple servers in business critical
environments to reduce risk and help DBAs during the recovery phase.

WWW: http://www.pgbarman.org/
